title: Ennui's Bigger Intro
description: A handy pack meant to introduce you to Ennui's Bigger Inventories. Embrace ten column inventories today with no hassle!
body:
# Ennui's Bigger Intro

Ennui's Bigger Intro is a starter modpack for [Ennui's Bigger Inventories](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_inventories), with one focused goal: provide players with a minimal base so they can enjoy having The Inventory Problem solved in the simplest and most convenient way possible!

- Enjoy bigger inventories with [Ennui's Bigger Inventories](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_inventories)! Thanks to how that mod works, this modpack is 100% compatible with vanilla servers!

- (Pending 1.21.2 update) Enjoy increased compatibility with specific mods (that you may install later!) with [Ennui's Bigger Gambiarra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ennuis_bigger_gambiarra)!

- Fear not about performance! The [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) and [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) quartet are all here to take care of core optimization!

- Have your gameplay boosted by new Minecraft features such as bundles enabled by default and better performance!

## Observations

<!-- Despite the modpack using Quilt Loader, it also uses Fabric API. This means that compatibility with Fabric mods should not be a worry at all! You should, however, worry if your mods are compatible with Ennui's Bigger Inventories, but as long as it doesn't expect inventories with 9 columns? You should be fine. -->

Something that should be repeated is: this is a starter pack! You are free to add your own mods on top of this pack! If you worry about incompatibilities, remember: as long as it doesn't mess with (or add) inventories? It should be fine!
